title: 2.6 practice
description: Practice what you learned in lesson 2.6.
topic_path: History of the Universe and Earth

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following best describes the state of the Earth in its infancy, 4.5 billion years ago?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A hot and inhospitable place for life
A freezing cold and inhospitable place for life
A freezing cold but hospitable place for life
A hot but hospitable place for life

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following describes the Earth’s mantle best?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A solid layer lying above a molten core
Very cold at the center but hotter on the outside

assessment_items.question_content:
**Radiation from elements created in nearby supernovae and meteor and asteroid impacts during accretion are reasons for which of the following?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Why early Earth was so hot
Why Earth only has one moon
Why Earth was suitable for the emergence of life
Why Earth is a rocky, not gaseous planet

assessment_items.question_content:
**What causes the tectonic plates that make up the Earth’s crust to move?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Gravitational forces exerted by the core
